summary: Iteration 5 - Visual Overhaul Testing (Jewel Tones + DM Sans): All critical visual features verified working. User rejected neon/cyber look from iteration 4, now using refined jewel tone colors and DM Sans font. Login page renders correctly. Dashboard displays jewel-tone gradient liquid fill cards (emerald for income, ruby-rose for expenses, sapphire-indigo for savings). Tab navigation works across all 5 screens with emerald active state. Dark mode toggle works via Settings > Theme showing true black (#000000) background. Light mode shows pure white (#FFFFFF) background. DM Sans font loading via Google Fonts CDN. Financial health score displays correctly. No JavaScript errors.

design_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings for shadow* style props (should use boxShadow) - React Native Web specific
useNativeDriver warning - expected in web environment, not affecting functionality
Some API calls return 520 status - likely backend/CDN intermittent issue, not visual related

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Jewel tone color palette correctly defined in theme.ts (emerald #10B981, ruby #EF4444, amber #F59E0B, teal #14B8A6, sapphire #3B82F6, amethyst #8B5CF6, rose #F43F5E)
✓ Dark mode background is true black (#000000) as per Colors.dark.background
✓ Light mode background is pure white (#FFFFFF) as per Colors.light.background
✓ DM Sans font loading correctly via Google Fonts CDN in _layout.tsx
✓ Liquid fill cards implemented with refined gradient effects (no neon glow)
✓ Tab navigation active state shows with emerald primary color
✓ Financial health score displays with proper jewel color ring and breakdown
✓ Insight cards use jewel-tone gradient fills (emerald-teal, amber, etc.)
✓ Theme toggle in Settings works correctly between Light/Dark/System modes
✓ Text contrast is legible in both modes (white on black, black on white)
✓ Card gradients look refined/muted without neon glow effects
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account (rajesh@visor.demo / Demo@123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 focused on visual overhaul verification after user rejected neon theme from iteration 4. Key changes from iteration 4: Neon → Accent (jewel tones) naming, Space Grotesk+Outfit → DM Sans font, removed bloom/glow effects from cards. All 5 tabs (Dashboard, Transactions, Insights, Invest, Settings) loading without errors. DM Sans font loading correctly via Google Fonts CDN. Emerald active tab state working. Dark mode with true black background working. Light mode with pure white background working. Liquid fill cards with refined gradients (no neon glow) working. Financial health score with breakdown working.
